prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, cross detail.

Scene: Avilia stands on the shore of a pale blue ocean made of ideas, product sketches, and small app windows. She holds one simple tool card labeled "先做出来" and steps onto a small bridge built from project blocks. Far away, faint lights suggest many possible opportunities, but the nearest path is concrete and small.

Core meaning: anxiety about AI opportunities is real, but the practical answer is to start building.

Style: reflective but clean Chinese blog illustration, large white space, black/red/white identity with a restrained pale blue ocean. Minimal handwritten Chinese labels: "蓝海", "焦虑", "先做出来".

Avoid motivational poster style, avoid giant title text, avoid overdramatic fantasy scene.
